scope: source-main server-wide mobile gateway discovers currently running CCB projects and Android Emulator communicates with a real CCB project

source_change.summary: ccb install mobile now merges the persisted host project registry with currently running ccbd processes discovered from /proc, so the app first page can list real local CCB projects that were not started by the new mobile registry writer.

real_backend_communication.emulator_ui_result: message is Sent and reply text OK is visible; Communicating marker cleared

verification.command: PYTHONPATH=lib python -m pytest test/test_mobile_cli_service.py test/test_mobile_gateway_service.py test/test_cli_management_install.py test/test_cli_management_update.py test/test_v2_cli_router.py test/test_v2_cli_parser.py -q
PYTHONPATH=lib python -m py_compile lib/mobile_gateway/project_registry.py lib/mobile_gateway/__init__.py lib/cli/services/mobile.py test/test_mobile_cli_service.py
git diff --check -- lib/mobile_gateway/project_registry.py lib/mobile_gateway/__init__.py lib/cli/services/mobile.py test/test_mobile_cli_service.py

remaining_risks: The live gateway includes persisted stale/unreachable registry entries; the app lists them as unavailable, while currently running projects are healthy.
The source checkout still has unrelated dirty files outside the mobile discovery commit; they were not included in source commit 821b7f7f.
